title: Develop Real-Time Clock
description: Implement a module to show the current time accurately and update in real-time without requiring page refreshes. Provide timezone switching functionality to allow users to select and view different time zones.

title: Design 'Geist' Aesthetic
description: Create CSS styles that incorporate minimalist design elements and a soft color palette, ensuring consistent spacing, alignment, and typography to align with the 'Geist' style.

title: Implement Central Globe Image
description: Display a globe image prominently in the user interface and allow interaction with the globe to select time zones if applicable.

title: Develop Time Logic Module
description: Manage time data fetching and calculations, including handling timezone conversions and real-time updates.

title: Create UI Components
description: Render the clock display and globe image, and implement user interface interactions for timezone switching.

title: Main Integration
description: Coordinate data flow between Time Logic and UI Components and manage the application lifecycle and state.

title: Cross-Browser Compatibility
description: Ensure the design is cross-browser compatible and responsive, optimizing loading times and utilizing lazy loading where appropriate.

title: Accessibility Compliance
description: Ensure the website follows accessibility standards to be usable for all users.

title: Testing
description: Conduct unit testing on the Time Logic module, integration testing to ensure seamless interaction between modules, and user interface testing for responsiveness and design accuracy.
